summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No GitHub mutations, merges, fixes, or close actions are planned. Open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer/proof follow-up; security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed PRs are left closed.
